testcase.name: standard user flow › test1 - login redirects to inventory
testcase.system-out: [SETUP] Starting browser context and login for standard user [SETUP] Login completed and page objects initialized [TEST1] Verifying redirect to inventory page [TEST1] Inventory page visible with Products header

testcase.name: standard user flow › test2 - can add item to cart
testcase.system-out: [TEST2] Adding 3 product(s) to cart [TEST2] Added to cart: Sauce Labs Backpack [TEST2] Added to cart: Sauce Labs Bike Light [TEST2] Added to cart: Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket [TEST2] Cart badge updated to 3

testcase.name: standard user flow › test3 - Sort products by name and price
testcase.system-out: [TEST3] Sorting products by name descending(Z-A) [TEST3] Products sorted by name descending [TEST3] Sorting products by name ascending(A-Z) [TEST3] Products sorted by name ascending [TEST3] Sorting products by price high to low [TEST3] Products sorted by price high to low [TEST3] Sorting products by price low to high [TEST3] Products sorted by price low to high

testcase.name: standard user flow › test4 - can open cart and see selected product
testcase.system-out: [TEST4] Opening cart page [TEST4] Product visible in cart: Sauce Labs Backpack [TEST4] Product visible in cart: Sauce Labs Bike Light [TEST4] Product visible in cart: Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket

testcase.name: standard user flow › test5 - can continue shopping from cart
testcase.system-out: [TEST5] Clicking "Continue Shopping" to return to inventory [TEST5] Returned to inventory page

testcase.name: standard user flow › test6 - can remove item from cart
testcase.system-out: [TEST6] Removing products from cart [TEST6] Number of previously added products: 3 [TEST6] Removed from cart: Sauce Labs Backpack [TEST6] Cart badge updated to 2

testcase.name: standard user flow › test7 - go to checkout
testcase.system-out: [TEST7] Proceeding to checkout from cart [TEST7] Navigated to checkout step one page

testcase.name: standard user flow › test8 - check Cancel button
testcase.system-out: [TEST8] Clicking "Cancel" to return to cart [TEST8] Returned to cart page

testcase.name: standard user flow › test9 - Validation of empty fields behavior
testcase.system-out: [TEST9] Testing checkout form validation for empty fields [TEST9] Checkout step one page loaded [TEST9] Error message displayed for empty fields

testcase.name: standard user flow › test10 - fill checkout form and continue
testcase.system-out: [TEST10] Filling checkout form with customer information [TEST10] Customer information filled [TEST10] Navigated to checkout step two page

testcase.name: standard user flow › test11 - cancel checkout from step two
testcase.system-out: [TEST11] Clicking "Cancel" to return to cart from checkout step two [TEST11] Returned to inventory page

testcase.name: standard user flow › test12 - Checkout Overview Validation
testcase.system-out: [TEST12] Proceeding to checkout overview page [TEST12] Checkout overview page loaded [TEST12] Checkout summary is visible

testcase.name: standard user flow › test13 - Finish Checkout and Return Home
testcase.system-out: [TEST13] Finishing checkout and returning home [TEST13] Checkout complete page loaded [TEARDOWN] Closing browser context
